AddPolicyStatement.description: Grants permission to give an AWS service or another account permission to use an AWS Entity Resolution resources

BatchDeleteUniqueId.description: Grants permission to batch delete unique Id

CreateIdMappingWorkflow.description: Grants permission to create a idmapping workflow

CreateIdNamespace.description: Grants permission to create a IdNamespace

CreateMatchingWorkflow.description: Grants permission to create a matching workflow

CreateSchemaMapping.description: Grants permission to create a schema mapping

DeleteIdMappingWorkflow.description: Grants permission to delete a idmapping workflow

DeleteIdNamespace.description: Grants permission to delete a IdNamespace

DeleteMatchingWorkflow.description: Grants permission to delete a matching workflow

DeletePolicyStatement.description: Grants permission to delete permission given to an AWS service or another account permission to use an AWS Entity Resolution resources

DeleteSchemaMapping.description: Grants permission to delete a schema mapping

GenerateMatchId.description: Grants permission to generate match Id

GetIdMappingJob.description: Grants permission to get a idmapping job

GetIdMappingWorkflow.description: Grants permission to get a idmapping workflow

GetIdNamespace.description: Grants permission to get a IdNamespace

GetMatchId.description: Grants permission to get match Id

GetMatchingJob.description: Grants permission to get a matching job

GetMatchingWorkflow.description: Grants permission to get a matching workflow

GetPolicy.description: Grants permission to get a resource policy for an AWS Entity Resolution resources

GetProviderService.description: Grants permission to get provider service

GetSchemaMapping.description: Grants permission to get a schema mapping

ListIdMappingJobs.description: Grants permission to list idmapping jobs

ListIdMappingWorkflows.description: Grants permission to list idmapping workflows

ListMatchingJobs.description: Grants permission to list matching jobs

ListMatchingWorkflows.description: Grants permission to list matching workflows

ListProviderServices.description: Grants permission to list provider service

ListSchemaMappings.description: Grants permission to list schema mappings

ListTagsForResource.description: Grants permission to List tags for a resource

PutPolicy.description: Grants permission to put a resource policy for an AWS Entity Resolution resources

StartIdMappingJob.description: Grants permission to start a idmapping job

StartMatchingJob.description: Grants permission to start a matching job

TagResource.description: Grants permission to adds tags to a resource

UntagResource.description: Grants permission to untag a resource

UpdateIdMappingWorkflow.description: Grants permission to update a idmapping workflow

UpdateIdNamespace.description: Grants permission to update a IdNamespace

UpdateMatchingWorkflow.description: Grants permission to update a matching workflow

UpdateSchemaMapping.description: Grants permission to update a schema mapping

UseIdNamespace.description: Grants permission to give an AWS service or another account permission to use IdNamespace within a workflow

UseWorkflow.description: Grants permission to give an AWS service or another account permission to use workflow within a IdNamespace

aws:RequestTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by a key that is present in the request the user makes to the entity resolution service

aws:ResourceTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by a tag key and value pair

aws:TagKeys.description: Filters access by the list of all the tag key names present in the request the user makes to the entity resolution service
